name: hue_counter
description: Count saturated discs in a 3-channel image whose hue falls in [hue_lo, hue_hi]. Live-tunable via exchange().

params.name: hue_lo
params.doc: Inclusive lower bound of HSV hue band (OpenCV scale: 0-179).

params.name: hue_hi
params.doc: Inclusive upper bound of HSV hue band.

params.name: min_area
params.doc: Minimum connected-component area (pixels) to count a region.

outputs.name: hue_lo
outputs.doc: Hue band lower bound used for this run.

outputs.name: hue_hi
outputs.doc: Hue band upper bound used for this run.

outputs.name: min_area
outputs.doc: Min area used for this run.

exchange.doc: Atomically set hue_lo and hue_hi. Next process() picks them up.
Set the area floor for component acceptance.
